mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, user_id, `name`, is_default, sort_order
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_category
create_time,
update_time,
user_id,
`name`,
is_default,
sort_order,
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{sortOrder,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mapper.update:
update tb_category
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_default = #{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT},
sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_category set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_default = #{isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT}, sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=TINYINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_category (create_time, update_time, user_id, `name`, is_default, sort_order) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.sortOrder,jdbcType=TINYINT} )
on duplicate key update create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time), user_id=values(user_id), `name`=values(`name`), is_default=values(is_default), sort_order=values(sort_order)
mapper.delete:
delete from tb_category where id in
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
update tb_category
create_time = #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`name` = #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_default = #{item.isDefault,jdbcType=TINYINT},
sort_order = #{item.sortOrder,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
